entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Webclient: We are getting an error when trying...
entry.content:
Hi @Kimbo ,

1. Are you using the Web Client in a tablet or PC/laptop ?

2. What web browser do you use? If you are using MS Edge suggest also to try in Google Chrome or Firefox

3. Just to double-confirm - the default layout assigned to the document is a Crystal layout or PLD? (web client supports Crystal layouts only)

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: FSD status is Cancellation Requested in SAP ERP in SA...
entry.content:
Hello,

which authorization object solved the issue for you? We have the same issue that the users cancel FSDs and it stays on Cancellation Requested.

entry.title: Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
Methodology

SAP BTP uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition) capabilities that enable the conversion of scanned documents or images containing text into editable and searchable data. By leveraging OCR, businesses can extract text from various documents, including invoices, receipts, contracts, and more, thus automating data entry processes and reducing manual errors.

To Start, go to SAP BTP Cockpit Trial -> Services MarketPlace ->Document Information Extraction Trial -> Create Instance

Step 1 — Create Instance

Service — Document Information Extraction Trial

Plan — blocks_of_100

Runtime Environment — Cloud Foundry

Space — dev/trial

Instance Name — Food Receipts/ Any relevant name

 

Step 2— Create Schema

  • Write Name according to the problem statement (In this case Food_Receipt_Invoice)
  • Document Type is Custom & OCR is used for type Document or Scene Text based on scenario

 

Step 3— Add fields to the Schema

Mention Field Names as per the Information you need to extract.Mention the Data Type as per field.Setup Type can be Manual or Auto.In this case we use auto.

 

Step 4 — Activate Schema

 

Step 5 — Upload the necessary Document

  • Select document type as Custom as you can select any document you want.

Schema should be Food Receipt Schema (One you created just now).

Click on confirm & go to Documents.

Step 6 — Review the extraction results

 

You can also review the extraction results in csv formats with more detailed information about the document.

Leveraging SAP Business Technology Platform for document information extraction empowers organizations to unlock the value hidden within their unstructured data. By employing methodologies such as OCR, NLP, ML models, and integration with intelligent technologies, businesses can automate document processing tasks, extract actionable insights, and drive informed decision-making. Whether it’s enhancing operational efficiency, improving compliance, or enhancing customer experiences, SAP BTP provides a comprehensive platform for organizations to harness the power of document information extraction in today’s digital era.

Step by Step Guide to the process - 

https://medium.com/@mjoshi2669/document-information-extraction-using-sap-btp-cockpit-1d9886b39096

entry.title: In RAP API unmanaged scenario with draft, Finalized method getting called during patch call
entry.content: Hello all, I am working on RAP API ( OData V4 UI ) unmanaged scenario with draft, so while every patch call ( entering field value ) save sequence methods ( finalize, save..etc ) is getting called. What can be wrong, Is it possible to avoid save sequence methods during patch call?. Thank You

entry.title: How to add custom fields in Standard Migration Object with Migration Object Modeler App
entry.content:
Introduction:

Let’s explore the options for adapting delivered content of the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit to meet our customer-specific circumstances.

The SAP S/4HANA migration object modeler is name of the modelling environment in the migration cockpit. Available in the on-premises version of SAP/4HANA, you can call it using Transaction LTMOM. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the migration object modeler is called via the SAP Fiori tile Model Migration Objects - Migration Object Modeler.

Prerequisite:
Before proceeding with adding custom fields, it is necessary to verify if the specific Migration Object allows the addition of custom fields. The business role SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR is required to use the SAP S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler.

To check which Migration Object support custom field additions, refer to SAP Note 2999428 - Collective Note for extensions via Model Your Migration Objects - Migration Object Modeler App in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition (Migrate Data Using Staging Tables), this specific KBA outlines the objects that permit custom fields to be added.

Use Case:
The field "Document Number" is not present in the Migration Object “Product” template. Downloaded template is not having any field “Document Number” in the Basic Data Tab as shown below.

Image/data in this blog is from SAP internal systems, sample data, or demo systems. Any resemblance to real data is purely coincidental.

Standard Template:

 

Steps to follow:

 

  1. Create a Migration Project from “Migrate Your Data” App, here as an example I have created the Migration Project “Test_Sap”.
     
  2. Open the Project (Test_Sap) in the Object Modeler App and go to the Migration Object “Product” and open the Source Structure in Edit mode.
     
  3. Then click on the create button.
     

     

  4. Once clicked you will see a new row got added with the prefix “ZZ”. Create the field as per your requirement and then click on Save.
     

     

  5. Now the field is created. We can see the field ZZ_ ZEINR in the Source Structure of the Migration Object. We need to map the newly added field to the Target Structure of the underlying API.

  6. To perform the Field Mapping, double-click on the Field Mapping node.
     

     

  7. Now as mentioned in the Prerequisite section the newly created field needs to be mapped to the underlying API Structure. Here the mapping is done with the field ZZ_ZEINR with the API field Document number (without document management system).
     

     

  8. To map it drag and drop the Source Structure to the Target Structure. Once mapped it will turn the Document Number sign in Green. By default, the Rule MOVE is used to map the Source and Target Structure, you can change the rule as per your business requirement.
     

     

  9. In the Object Modeler app regenerate the Migration Object using the Reset Migration Object option.

     

     

  10. Now download the Template from the app Migrate Your Data app.

  11. The required field will be added as a custom field in the template.

     

This is specific adding custom fields in Migration Object in the S/4 HANA Private Edition to add custom fields in S/4 HANA Private Edition refer to this blog.

entry.title: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA environment that does not allow for edits?
entry.content:
I have a set of flavors / global scripts that are functional in dev. When everything is transported to QA (an environment which does not permit edits to scripts/flavors), there is a synchronization issue. None of the global scripts are associated with the flavors in QA.

I also noticed that the Transport System Synchronization did not run. 

Could someone help me to understand what the Transport system synchronization does, and how I might move forward to get the screens/scripts working in QA?

 

Thank you!

Daniel Frantz

entry.title: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content:
Hello!
I have an issue with inspection lot numbers.
We changed number range status "10000070900" for number range No. "01" via QA09 t-code.
The screenshot is available on the attachments. ("QA09 current.png")
After changing the number range status I tried to create some inspection lots.
You can see inspection lots' images, too. ("Inspection lots.png")
So, the inspections' numbers didn't occur as expected. Also, number range status didn't change after creating inspection lots.
I would want to mention that, I changed it 2 times. Unfortunately, the number range status doesn't perceive the latest version and don't change automatically.

We hope somebody had the same issue.
I look forward your solving ideas for this problem.

Thanks for attention.
Kindly regards.

entry.title: Re: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System U...
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

I need to clarify some things regarding your recent reply.

First, the ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) is always recommended when an ABAP system contains custom code. However, you will need a more applicable check variant, as the S4HANA_READINESS_xxxx variants do not fit the SAP S/4HANA Foundation use case.

Secondly, there is no dedicated upgrade guide for SAP S/4HANA Foundation, as SAP S/4HANA Foundation is not allowed to be used as a standalone instance. You will need to refer to the upgrade guide for the installed ABAP add-on solution implemented in the system. A list of supported ABAP add-ons for SAP S/4HANA Foundation 2023 is available in SAP Note 3306766 - SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2023: Release Information Note.

Lastly, in addition to the ABAP add-on guide and related SAP Notes, please review the applicable Software Update Manager (SUM) upgrade guide based on the version and support package version you select for your upgrade. Here is a link to the SAP Help Portal page for User Guides for System Maintenance Tools: https://help.sap.com/docs/help/c4ebc2b5d928446180d9ad2667f11faa/a151c8571e0c46b0a4098eda8d34303a.html?locale=en-US.

Best Regards,
Greg

entry.title: Re: Sending notification to SAP build workzone from CAP app
entry.content: It gives the following error: [notifications] - Sending notification of key: Default and version: 1 [persistent-outbox] - Emit failed { event: 'Default', cause: Error: NotificationType with key Default and version 1 does not exist at NotifyToRest.postNotification (/home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@cap-js/notifications/srv/notifyToRest.js:35:21) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) at async Promise.all (index 0) at async NotifyToRest.handle (/home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:65:21) at async ODataRequest.<anonymous> (/home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/outbox/index.js:286:18) at async ODataRequest.emit (/home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/req/context.js:58:9) at async ApplicationService.commit (/home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-tx.js:132:7) at async /home/user/projects/Student/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/cds-services/adapter/odata-v4/handlers/action.js:61:9 { unrecoverable: true } }

entry.title: Equinor boosts Asset Performance with SAP Asset Performance Management
entry.content:
Present in 30 countries and the biggest energy company in Norway, Equinor provides energy for 170 million people daily and operates the world‘s largest integrated offshore pipeline system. It is the number one pipeline gas supplier in Europe, the third largest net seller of crude oil in the world, and in 2022, celebrated 50 years of turning natural resources into energy for people and progress for society.

From Manual to Machine-driven Processes
In the past, Equinor had relied on manual processes for decision-making in asset management, but as the company expanded, it began embracing a data-driven approach using automated dashboards. However, its decision makers recognized the need for further advancements and envisioned adopting Condition Based Maintenance.

This transformation would allow for a more autonomous, machine-led and data-driven approach to asset management, freeing up valuable internal resources and enabling team members to handle multiple cases simultaneously.

Tom Naastad Svennevig, Leading Engineer at Equinor explained “Equinor wanted to progress from condition monitoring to condition based maintenance. For the past 8 or 9 years we have operated a monitoring center where a few equipment groups are being monitored by use of home-grown dashboards as well as third party expert systems. However, as the number of plants onboarded to the center increased, it required more and more resources. We believe that applying Condition Based Maintenance on equipment where it is possible to connect a remedial action to a degradation mechanism will relieve the resources working in the monitoring center”.

Condition Based Maintenance (CBM) is paradigm shift in asset management, allowing companies to move from traditional calendar-based maintenance schedules to a proactive approach powered by data-driven insights. While traditional maintenance strategies often lead to unplanned downtime, CBM empowers operators make informed decisions based on real-time equipment condition, mitigating disruptions, and maximizing asset reliability.

Tom said, “The primary purpose of Condition Based Maintenance for us is to provide confidence for continued safe operation and avoid disruption” and added “We believe that several degradation mechanisms we had in the past can be detected automatically, and actions being taken without human intervention”.

Benefits of an Integrated Solution
For Equinor, SAP Asset Performance Management stood out as a superior choice, offering a range of tangible benefits. The manager remarked “In contrast to third-party solutions that require data migration, SAP Asset Performance Management seamlessly integrates with existing SAP systems, eliminating the need for redundant data entry and ensuring data accuracy across all platforms”.

 

Other benefits that Equinor perceives, comprise: 

- Reduced administrative burdens and increased overall efficiency

- Automatic updating of asset information across all relevant components

- Importing equipment condition status from third-party expert systems

- Storing evidence for safe operation and triggering actions for degraded conditions

- Generating notifications based on condition monitoring rules for prompt responses to potential 
  equipment issues

- Seamless ingestion of sensor data from field systems into SAP Asset Performance Management

- Pre-assigning tasks to maintenance notifications based on asset strategies and failure modes

- Empowering maintenance teams to act swiftly and effectively, minimizing downtime and preventing  
  potential equipment failures

- Seamless scaling to accommodate additional equipment and assets


Optimizing Asset Status Visualization with SAP Asset Performance Management
Effectively visualizing asset status is crucial for making timely and well-informed decisions, which is why SAP Asset Performance Management offers comprehensive dashboarding capabilities through the embedded SAP Analytics Cloud. This allows users to select specific assets or entire fleets for a detailed overview in a centralized view. That enables quick identification of potential issues and facilitates proactive maintenance interventions. The dashboard utilizes clear, intuitive labels to indicate asset health status, ranging from “excellent” to “unacceptable”, which streamlines decision-making. Critical alerts are prominently displayed in orange, immediately grabbing the attention of maintenance personnel, and providing necessary context and guidance ensuring that timely and appropriate actions are taken. Additionally, the dashboard seamlessly integrates with Equinor’s wider SAP ecosystem, enabling real-time data exchange and integration with existing maintenance processes.

Effective Change Management is Important for the CBM Implementation
Equinor has implemented a CBM-driven maintenance approach. CBM is running in production. The job to roll out the solution has started. The process of change management is main focus going forward. The manager explained “We will achieve this through clear leadership commitment, comprehensive communication, a pilot project for proof of concept, streamlined data smoothing for accurate monitoring, role redefinition for CBM management, establishment of KPI’s for continuous improvement, and employee empowerment through involvement. Our objective is that this will result in transitioning to a proactive maintenance approach for 40% of our equipment and significant reductions in maintenance costs and asset downtime”.

Tom concluded “SAP Asset Performance Management helps us streamlining maintenance processes and facilitating proactive preventive maintenance”.

 

Click here to read TAC Insights’ whitepaper to learn more about Equinor’s journey implementing condition-based maintenance. 

Read the solution brief by clicking here and watch a short video on how to design asset maintenance strategies that best-fit your business while AI and an advanced rules engine notify you of anomalies and update health scores in real time.

entry.title: Re: how to see quantity per warehouse in list of items
entry.content: You can add multiple UDF fields on Sales Order screen, each field corresponds to 1 warehouse, then write FMS to retrieve "In stock" from OITW table

entry.title: Is DRC a mandatory part of the public cloud purchase for certain countries?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer only has BTP license and they would like to know for Document report compliance solution, does customer has to purchase the public cloud solution in certain countries?

 

Thanks in advance

Helinna

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: Interesting Posts, New Areas, More Events!
entry.content:
As promised last week in my post about new platform enhancements, I'm back with a platform-exclusive version of the SAP Community Voice newsletter.

While we discontinued the email version of the newsletter in June, SAP Community Voice lives on right here in What's New. And the mission hasn't changed. The newsletter continues to highlight interesting blog posts, new areas for you to explore, and more!

Since it's been more than a month since our last newsletter, let's dive right in!

 

Featured Content

 

SAP Datasphere: How to Enable the "WORKDAYS" Functions

We're always happy to highlight a post from a first-time blogger! The author in this case (who, after contributing for years to SAP Community, is diving into blogging with this post) decided to explore functions he couldn't find covered in help documentation and KBAs: ADD_WORKDYS and WORKDAYS_BETWEEN.

Read the blog post

 

Post Goods Receipt Without Reference in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Post Goods Receipt Without Reference (an SAP Fiori app) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud can help you streamline your procurement process by allowing you to post goods receipts without a purchasing document. This post explores the app's features and explains how to use it.

Read the blog post

 

New eBook -- SAP Integration Strategy

The second edition of the SAP Integration Strategy eBook focuses on how customers benefit from an integrated SAP software portfolio by enabling them to design, model, implement, and ultimately run their business processes end-to-end.

Read the blog post

 

SAP: A Leader in Recurring Billing Applications

SAP has been named a leader in the first-ever 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for recurring billing applications. This post provides access to the full report and announcement, as well as explores the significance of this honor.

Read the blog post

 

Community News

 

Check Out the Latest SAP Community Content

We recently published these new topic pages: Data Transition and Transformation and SAP Subscription Billing. We also launched a new interest group (Business Transformation Champions), as well as these new location groups: Irvine, California, USA (Americas), Luzern, Switzerland (Europe), and Aukland, New Zealand (Asia Pacific). In addition, all location groups have events boards now, to make it easier for members to connect closer to home. And speaking of events…

 

Find Out How to Become an Event Organizer!

Now that every location group has its own events board, it's even easier to find -- and plan -- events close to you! There's even a new events group designed to help event organizers. If that sounds interesting to you, you'll want to visit the new Become an Event Organizer page. There you'll learn about the requirements and benefits associated with serving as an SAP Community event organizer, and if you want to participate, you can apply to become an event organizer.

entry.title: Getting emails with feedback<company id>@products from Successfactors Performance Management
entry.content:
Hi

We have enabled Single Sender and when i launch form for an employee the manager gets an email with subject "feedback<company id>@products"

The employee gets the email configured in notification settings correctly

can anyone let me know of this behavior.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO migration? Why you should move to the Cloud with SAP Integration Suite!
entry.content:
@thomas_volmering . Hi Thomas, In regards to this SAP PI/PO systems, "maintenance until end of 2027 with option of extended maintenance until end of 2030". Is there any links to official statements for SAP that you can share. Is there any one I reach out to, regarding the same. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA envir...
entry.content:
The transport system synchronization is not related to this issue. It is used to populate Personas-specific tables related to transported objects, to speed up searches in the Admin transaction when looking for objects.

You had another thread about this topic already and if I'm not mistaken, maybe even a support incident created recently. In theory, the linkage between global scripts and the flavor should not be lost when transporting from one system to another. Those are generated as part of the transport process, when the objects are moved. Should this not happen for some reason, running the 'Update Object Relations' function in the target (in this case, QA) system via the Admin's Health Check will rebuild these records. After that, you should also clear the flavor cache in the target and then the problem is supposed to be taken care of.

entry.title: Re: Do I need to do a new init for my extractors now that...

entry.title: SAC live BW Query variable not applying from URL
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am working with SAC in a BW live connection environment. I wonder whether it is possible to configure the URL to input the variable values for the BW query prompt I use in the SAC story.

I have tried checking this forum, but it's not clear to me whether it is only possible with variables set in the SAC model or if it is possible with the variables from the BW query itself.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/query-variable-not-applying-from-url/qaq-p/12698172

I've tried it, and I have not been able to do it. I would like to know if it's technically not possible to input values in the URL for a BW query, so I can stop testing :).

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello based on: I realized the solution recommended by note 1055907 was implemented a few years ago. This was applied to be able to send a different email object and core depending if it is MAN_CALL, SD_CALL or SUB_CALL. The two programs indicated in the note were modified consequently and the solution of cover sheet was deactivated.

I am not sure if i understand your status correct and therefore it is not really possible to help you.

First: which "two programms" are you refering to ? (The two programs indicated in the note XY). What change did you done? Did you used a "copy" or did you used a "modification"?

Second: explain better the term "email object"; not clear what you refer to..

Third: the two "environmental parameters  (refer to your screenshot) are dedicated to be used in "MSDS/SDS" dispatch only.

If you need something different: you should define e.g. "Z" enviromental parameters and check the use of the original environmental parameter. (whcih "routine" is selecting the content of the parameters)

C.B.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/email-body-text-change-in-sost-for-automatic-report-shipping/qaq-p/12802775

could be of interest

entry.title: how to send message to all portal active users?
entry.content: How to send popup message to all active portal users? TH_POPUP is triggering only in GUI and not in portal. please help.

entry.title: Re: Data on the report of the in-progress Calibration ses...
entry.content:
Hello @Marisa_shi,

Yes, we got a response from SF on my question. They identified the reason, and it is due to Auto Data Purge feature. In this Auto Data Purge, there is an option "Audit Data Without Personally Identifiable Information (retention period: 180 days)" which is checked automatically in the lower instances (preview and test). 

Because of this option, the data is getting purged and so the ratings of the calibration sessions fall off from the report.

Regards,
Balaji

entry.title: /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q Graph
entry.content:
Hi Team,

What is Capacity Integral and Used Capacity in both the /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q graphs. Please can you explain me with the examples.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Event Mesh Consumption of Messages Not working
entry.content:
I have changed it to the below but still the message is only successfully emitting but I dont see it is printing msg.data anytime.


const cds = require('@sap/cds');
class CatalogService extends cds.ApplicationService {
    async init() {
        const messaging = await cds.connect.to('messaging')

        messaging.on('test/cap/dev/publisher', msg => {
          console.log(msg.data)
        })
       
        this.on('messagePersistence', async (req) => {
          await messaging.emit({
            event: 'test/cap/dev/publisher',
            data: `Hello`
          })
          console.log('Messaging Emitted Done')
          return 'OK'
        })
        return super.init();
    }
}

module.exports = { CatalogService };

entry.title: Re: Define reservation category for movement type 313
entry.content:
You can copy MVT 313 with t-code OMJJ, let's say new MVT Type 913, then you can edit the value of the field "Reserv. cat."

Also you should do this step: in Allowed transactions define MB21 for newly created MVT Type 913

Let's check: 

1. MB21, MVT Type 913

2. Saved RSRV:

3. MIGO, ref to RSRV 172 (MVT913), 1st step

entry.title: Re: how to update startdate and duedate fields in product...
entry.content:
Hi Y-Yusuf,

Please share the screenshot showing all the date (Start Date, Due Date, Order Date etc.) fields (in header and rows) for the affected Production Order.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: S4 PDF preview behavior want to compare with other companies
entry.content:
I am looking for some validation in the PDF preview option (output / spool) and behavior in SAP. Especially how it works in your current S4 system. We have some issues and can not pin point it's a SAP issue, Adobe issue or something else. It's different from our ECC system hence looking for some validation.

Currently GUI 8.00

GUI Options - Interaction design - Control settings = Internet Explorer.

Working with ADS.

In SP01 - when we branch to display on screen - you can go into the menu and select PDF preview.

- ECC behavior - popup if we want to save to file and display "normally" on the screen - you can press the zoom option to make the document a little better.

- S4 behavior - no popup to save and a big gray block is shown. Display saying 100% zoom. Now when we scroll down we are able to view the document - but completely FULL SCREEN. Now when we press the zoom option - suddenly the document is really scaled on the page (like in ECC). Looks like 2 gray blocks above and below the form is added.

I have reviewed some settings in our Adobe Reader that was suggested from OSS notes. We also tried program FP_TEST_00 from an OSS to check the behavior and that is working perfectly w/o issue even the option to save the document to a file.

Additional behavior: When we switch to option in SAP GUI to Chromium the PDF preview now returns blank screen and using zoom functions it does not magically make it appear. 

I would like to know

- How is your PDF behavior in your S4 system? Does it generate directly the print on screen, do you get a popup for saving the file, or same behavior like our system.

- Any hints that might be helpful to troubleshoot? I have searched for OSS and tried a lot but without success.

Note we are working directly with SAP and looks like they have no idea and categorize the behavior as a feature in S4 and would like to have evidence if that is true (or not ofcourse.....)

Merci!

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content:
Hi @cgueler and @jonshelley,

With the Lite Viewer, it is limited to use cases when someone launches a Story via URL. For our scenarios such as opening a Story via the Application will still open the story in the Full Viewer.

Yes we had initially limited it to ?shellMode=embed but our goal is to make sure that irrespective of the viewer that someone is consuming (i.e. View, Present, or Embed), we provide the most performant experience.

We do apologize that you're experience some issues with the Lite Viewer. Please submit incidents to SAP so that we can investigate them and fix them as quickly as possible.

Regards,

Tunir

entry.title: SAP BY Design - UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a question about the UK BACS Domestic Payment Format.

This is a standard format available in SAP Business By Design. However, our bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software. I would like to know if this is possible to make such adjustments and if so, how do we import them in the system?

Thank you. 

Best regards.

 Valerie

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello Community - 

Happy to be here and add my voice to the Business Transformation Champions channel.

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH...
entry.content:
Hi,

Are you migrating to S/4 HANA? If that is the case, then you don't need to migrate those Materials but if you bring any Transactional data for those materials then you need to migrate materials as well. 

When I was working on such type of project it took us 6 months, but it was not just for PTP but all other areas as well i.e. SD,MM,FICO etc.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again checked
entry.content:
We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again checked it and it shows -> In use and Valid To: 27 July, 2025.
Is there a need to change the SSL certificate again because of the DC change? ? Could this be impacting the use of existing certificate(installed initially)?
Kindly assist.

entry.title: Re: Behind the Scenes with SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer Feedback
entry.content: The business driven configuration questionnaire can be found in the Perform Initial Business Process Assessment for SAP S/4HANA Cloud task.

entry.title: Re: This document cannot be deleted Message no. V1006
entry.content:
If a Delivery Document (and Invoice, even cancelled) for a Sales Order is existing then the Sales Order cannot be deleted. 

What is the need to delete the Sales Order? Can you not block it or reject it? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA envir...
entry.content: If you run the Personas Health Check, it is found in the dropdown menu. The path is Health Check -> Tools -> Update Object Relations.

entry.title: Re: SAP Basis Learning - the most useful transactions
entry.content: The second part is ready:

entry.title: Re: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA envir...
entry.content: Hi Tamas, is there a way to clear the flavor cache for the system as opposed to the browser?

entry.title: Send mail using cl_bcs via SAP distribution list
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send a mail by using class cl_bcs and a SAP internal distribution list.

That means, I want to create a SAP internal distribution list via SBWP, eg:

Then I want to maintain the mail addresses of recipients in this distribution list.

Then I want to send a mail to this distribution list.

Please do NOT provide any solutions by using deprecated FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1!

How could this work? Any got an idea? How can I specifcy / create a recipient object that refers to the distribution list?

BR

entry.title: Re: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA envir...
entry.content: Yes. It's also in the Health Check, under Cleanup -> Advanced Options -> Clear Flavor Cache.

entry.title: Re: How is the currency for Statistical value for foreign...
entry.content:
The SAP help of EIKP- GRWCU mentions this is Local Currency of Company that is processing Import/Export Document. 

Can you check on this? 

SAP Help document of EIKP- GRWCU: 

Currency of statistical values for foreign trade

The currency that applies to the statistical value.

Use

As a rule, the currency is the same as the local currency of the company that is processing the export/import document.

entry.title: Re: PO discount Condition not reflect in GRN
entry.content:
Hi,

In your last screenshot from Control data, can you please make the changes according to the below screenshot. ZDIS Condition type should be same as HB01. Let me know the system behavior after changes.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )

and using the status filter

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Data source name of /BA1C/DBTHEAD
entry.content: might have used a CDS view

entry.title: Re: Adobe PDF file generated from Spool opening
entry.content: One question, do you need the spool? Why are you generating it? Why not generating the PDF directly?

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Preview of the App with all the columns, search and filter options.

2. Search records based on Description field and Status field.

entry.title: We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.
entry.content:
We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.

Could you please let us know if this is feasible? If so, we would appreciate guidance on how to apply it and any best practices to follow.

entry.title: Re: Changes in Workflow is not reflecting in quality system
entry.content: Compare the workflow versions between the development and quality environments..In development, new changes might have been updated in the current version itself, whereas in quality, they might have been created as a new version..

entry.title: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm using UI integration card for my advanced workzone on BTP.

The UI integration card is component based.

It works but I can't add custom css.

In a freestyle UI5 app I'm adding css file, reference it in the manifest and it works.

I did it for the card project but on runtime I'm getting 404 for the style file.

Is it possible to add custom css for a component based UI integration card?

If yes, how?

Regards,

Omri

entry.title: YTD Calculation in SAC Excel Add in Using GETDATA()
entry.content:
We want to calculate YTD AMOUNT in SAC Excel ADD in.

Currently Excel add is not supporting multiple selection is , is there any workaround?


SAP.GetData("DS_1","YEAR","2024", "Mnth","01,02,03,04,05,06.07")

We are using this for a connection to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC),

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @PeiL within the Optimized Experience we have support the option to Link Models which ensures that the entire dashboard is filtered to the same context irrespective of where the filter is from. There is a difference where in the Optimized Experience we have removed the entry point from the Builder Panel as there was a ton of confusion between a Blended Visualization versus a Filtering Across Models. You can still create the link via the toolbar.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add whole PO items to workflow ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am not sure how system will read every PO for the line items and then fetch those into email. Because email is just to inform a user to approve something in his SAP inbox where they can find the details of PO in my inbox.

Also, here the link to Email Notification for workflow.

E-mail Notification for PR/PO Approver - SAP Community

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: HANA On-Prem to HANA Cloud Datalake without HANA Cloud DB
entry.content: What message/error do you get when you try to create the remote table?

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@richard_codron we do support creating a Rank on a Chart. It is available via the right-click context menu OR via the three dot menu. There are just a handful of unsupported features that are remaining in the Optimized Experience which can be found in our official documentation HERE. 

NOTE there are certain features which will not be supported in the Optimized Experience. You can find that within the section called Features That Won't Be Available in Optimized Story Experience. We've updated our documentation to make it more clear.

For issues around quality, please submit bugs to SAP so that we can investigate and resolve them as soon as possible.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Task 2:

entry.title: Re: How to Update from a Lower to a Higher Support Packag...
entry.content: Refer to the instructions provided in Upgrade and Update of SAP Solution Manager | SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere End to End Training
entry.content:
End to End Lecture with Handson Demo on SAP Datasphere is available for Learning in Udemy. End to End Hands-on with use case explained in detail. Share with your friends.  #Datasphere #Data #SAP #SAPDatasphere #SAPDWC #SAPBTP #BTP
Click Below to enter the Full Course:  https://www.udemy.com/course/sap-datasphere-end-to-end-handson-from-realtime-expert/

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere End to End Training
entry.content: Full Course Link - https://www.udemy.com/course/sap-datasphere-end-to-end-handson-from-realtime-expert/

entry.title: How to get the multiple include option for filter fields in fiori UI created via custom entity CDS?
entry.content:
I have created a Fiori UI5 via BAS using a custom CDS entity as a data source.

My UI screen looks like below with few selection items for filters and a list report to display.

Now when i click on the F4 help request on any of the input fields, im not able to see any option for selection other than "EQUALS" such as "BETWEEN" or "EXCLUDE", which by default comes when a normal CDS view is exposed as a service.

I have created a v4 service exposing this custom entity.

Even in my BAS annotation.xml the filter restrictions have all the required include options. 

@Andre_Fischer Need you expertise here to help me with a solution. Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hi,

Are you certain that your workflow template WS99800003 was transported to QA in the same transport as the new custom task?  Please double check your transport logs.

entry.title: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts

 

Any idea how to read incoming xml namespace using groovy script ?

Requirement is to validate namespace and if it does not match the correct version, fail the iflow.

I was also thinking abt XSLT but how do I then fail the iflow it version does not match?

<xsl:if test="//namespace::*[.!='http://testns/2.6']">

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content:
I actually never tried to change the status (i.e. the next number).

However, be aware that numbers are buffered on the application server. You can see the size of the buffer in SNRO.

It is not completely clear to me what you want to achieve. How about lowering the upper limit of the number range  to 10000070900, and create a new number range starting wherever you want, an reassign the inspection origins to the new number range.

entry.title: Re: Making employees recently increased in EC ineligible in compensation worksheets
entry.content:
Hi @Svetlana92 

Taking a look at this today and will update.

entry.title: Re: Revenue Accounting and Reporting (RAR) | Concept and Configuration
entry.content:
How can I close the RAR contract? even if POB is still "In Process" status

Is there any way to manually close the RAR contract?

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi14 

Unfortunately the calculation logic cannot be changed on these standard fields. Only the number format can.

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenExchange destination in BTP CF using MTA.yam
entry.content: Here is my xs-app.json of my "custapp" service:

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content: You can create headers/properties from XSLT, which you can use in a router step that diverts to an 'Error End' when appropriate

entry.title: Re: How to get the multiple include option for filter fie...
entry.content: show us your metadata, that determines a lot of thing.
